title: Health Charted Treatment Stack
description: Medications, supplements, therapies, and environmental modifications with mechanism and evidence tracking.

treatments.description: Canonical name source for medication and supplement references in other files.

type.description: medication, supplement, therapy, environmental modification, etc.

name.description: Canonical treatment name. Use this exact string in all other files.

mechanism.description: How this treatment works at the biological level

monitoring.description: What to track and how often

interactions.description: Known or suspected interactions with other treatments
